# Third-party assets

`ip/bondpad_70x70_novias` is copied without modification from
[`IHP-GmbH/ihp-sg13g2-librelane-template`](https://github.com/IHP-GmbH/ihp-sg13g2-librelane-template)
and is used solely because the IHP SG13G2 Open PDK does not ship this bond-pad
macro. The source template is licensed under Apache-2.0.
